Class Bill

java.lang.Object
Entities.Bill
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Bill extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a bill for a reservation. Contains information about the bill ID, associated reservation ID, total amount, issue date and time, and payment status.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • Bill

      public Bill(int billID, int reservationID, double totalAmount)
      Constructor for creating a new bill. Sets the issue time to the current time and marks the bill as unpaid.
      Parameters:
      billID - the unique identifier for the bill
      reservationID - the ID of the associated reservation
      totalAmount - the total amount of the bill

    • Bill

      public Bill(int billID, int reservationID, double totalAmount, LocalDateTime issuedAt, boolean paid)
      Constructor for creating a bill from database records.
      Parameters:
      billID - the unique identifier for the bill
      reservationID - the ID of the associated reservation
      totalAmount - the total amount of the bill
      issuedAt - the date and time when the bill was issued
      paid - the payment status of the bill

  • Method Details

    • getBillID

      public int getBillID()
      Returns the unique identifier of the bill.
      Returns:
      the bill ID

    • setBillID

      public void setBillID(int billID)
      Sets the unique identifier of the bill.
      Parameters:
      billID - the new bill ID

    • getReservationID

      public int getReservationID()
      Returns the ID of the associated reservation.
      Returns:
      the reservation ID

    • getTotalAmount

      public double getTotalAmount()
      Returns the total amount of the bill.
      Returns:
      the total amount

    • setTotalAmount

      public void setTotalAmount(double totalAmount)
      Updates the total amount of the bill.
      Parameters:
      totalAmount - the new total amount

    • getIssuedAt

      public LocalDateTime getIssuedAt()
      Returns the date and time when the bill was issued.
      Returns:
      the issue date and time

    • isPaid

      public boolean isPaid()
      Returns whether the bill has been paid.
      Returns:
      true if the bill is paid, false otherwise

    • markAsPaid

      public void markAsPaid()
      Marks the bill as paid.
